results.title: New research upends the argument for a popular longevity supplement
results.description: Gwyneth Paltrow has tried it. So have Kendall Jenner and Hailey Bieber. And lest you think this product is just for women, know that influencers such as Andrew Huberman, Bryan Johnson and Gary Brecka have all endorsed its use, too. The post New research upends the argument for a popular longevity supplement appeared first on Hawaii Tribune-Herald .
